overall.description: A cinematic third-person game engine scene showing a hooded character in a flowing white cloak standing on a sandy beach, facing a picturesque coastal village with a stone church and bell tower. The environment features a wooden pier, natural rock arches, and calm ocean waters under a dynamic partly cloudy sky with birds flying overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with historic stone village and wooden pier

agents.ego_description: hooded character in white cloak standing on sandy beach, facing the coastal village and observing the surroundings with minimal movement

entered.detail: tall stone church with golden bell tower and spire, central focal point of the coastal village
wooden dock structure extending along the shoreline with vertical posts
large natural rock formation with archway opening, covered with green vegetation on top
calm coastal waters with gentle waves lapping at the shore
tall rocky sea stacks rising from the ocean in the distance
wet sand with patches of seaweed and small rocks in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a serene sandy beach facing a historic coastal village. A prominent stone church with a golden bell tower rises in the center distance, flanked by a wooden pier on the right and dramatic rock formations on the left. The scene is bathed in natural midday sunlight with scattered clouds drifting across the sky, and birds occasionally fly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, cinematic gaze across a serene sandy beach toward a historic coastal village. It begins with a hooded character in a white cloak standing still, facing a distant stone church with a golden bell tower that anchors the horizon. As the camera lingers, the view expands to reveal a wooden pier stretching into the water on the right and dramatic rock formations framing the left side of the coast. The scene remains bathed in natural midday sunlight, with scattered clouds drifting across the sky and birds gliding overhead to complete the tranquil atmosphere.
